title: celmisia glandulosa var. glandulosa
intro: Celmisia glandulosa var. glandulosa, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. The health benefits of Celmisia glandulosa var. glandulosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas or infusions, as well as being used in topical applications such as salves and ointments.
